programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest.

programme.title: Head of State
programme.desc: When Washington desperately needs a presidential candidate just weeks before the election, they need someone sure to lose. They pick Mays Gilliam (Chris Rock), an unknown local politician from a down-and-out D.C. neighborhood, to be their puppet.

programme.title: Down to Earth
programme.desc: Struggling black comic Lance Barton (Chris Rock) knows what it's like to die on stage. But when his life takes an unexpected turn - straight to heaven - Lance is sure there's been a mistake.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: The spoof that started it all. Scream with the Wayans brothers, Carmen Electra, Shannon Elizabeth, and Anna Faris as they bumble and shriek their way to horror-movie hilarity in Scary Movie.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Four teens are tricked by their professor into visiting a haunted house for a school project.

programme.title: Scary Movie 3
programme.desc: David Zucker (AIRPLANE!) directs SCARY MOVIE 3, which piles on hysterical, yet gratuitous, cameos with thrillers, blockbusters, and pop-culture in general getting their best goosing yet.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Fearing they'll be separated forever if Ray and Lisa marry other people, Tia and Tamera plot to derail Ray's new romance.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Lisa blames Ray for leading a bridal client astray, while Tia and Tamera see Roger in a whole new light during a double date.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: When Lisa's disapproving mother comes for a visit, Ray agrees to pose as her husband.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: After their parents forbid them to attend a rap concert, the twins sneak out of the house to meet their idol anyway.
After Pearl is mugged in the park, Mary and Rose pose as elderly women to help Sandra, a newly appointed meter maid, nab the criminal.
Unimpressed with Brenda's wisecracking history teacher, Mary has words with the school principal.
When her parents refuse to send her to Europe, Brenda turns to coercion by accepting a proposal of marriage from a visiting prince.
While on a hike with Alexandria and her Buttercup troop, Mary and Sandra capture an escaped killer.
Mary's partnership with a local baker turns stale when he tries to con her out of a cookie recipe that could be worth a fortune.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Acting on a rumor that the local football team is moving, a crazed fan takes the bar hostage.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: After an argument with his wife of 49 years, Malcolm's grandfather arrives to stay with him and Eddie.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie offers to take over at the bar so Malcolm can dine with his girlfriend's wealthy father.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Ticket scalping gets Malcolm and Eddie jailed on the eve of Martin Luther King Day.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: An unruly customer challenges Eddie to a fight; Nicolette and Holly try being roommates.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: When Fred accidentally stumbles upon an attempted murder, the criminal tries to make it two victims for the price of one. Fred ends up in the hospital and is given police protection. Will the killer find him anyway?

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred takes the money Lamont has been saving for acting lessons and uses it for something more important -- a supply of Whopper Choppers.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: When a Sanford Arms' tenant can't come up with the rent, he leaves Fred his pet elephant as collateral. What else could Fred do with an elephant except stage a circus? And what a circus it is!

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: While Lamont is away on a fishing trip, Fred rents out his room to a very pregnant lady. When the time comes, Fred rushes her to the hospital -- where he's accused of being the father!

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont figures the only way to cure Fred of being a 'teleholic' is to hypnotize him into thinking that every time he gets the urge to turn on the set, the set will overheat. Which will blow up first -- the TV set or Fred?

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Suspicious of Lamont's mysterious new girlfriend Janet, Fred feels an investigation is in order and transforms himself into the Watts version of Columbo.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Louise learns her old home in Harlem is being torn down and takes off for a late-night visit to the house and a poignant rendezvous with the memories it contains.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Willis and the Jeffersons have an all-too-close encounter with a member of the Ku Klux Klan -- he's a new neighbor -- and someone may not live to tell about it.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George basks in the limelight after heroically saving an elderly woman from a mugger and capturing the thug, but he's soon looking for a dark place to hide when the man escapes custody and sets out to get even.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George is coerced into singing a love song to Louise when his 'cash' Valentine's Day present is refused as 'unfeeling.'

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George exaggerates his financial standing to gain membership in one of New York's most exclusive businessmen's clubs and finds himself over his head when, as his first act, he inadvertently pledges $100,000 to the club's building fund.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George searches for the right words to express his feelings in a eulogy for one of his employees -- the man died while George was firing him and it seems he was universally disliked.

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When the Emerson brothers get a bit drunk, Joey confesses a secret to Roc that still affects their relationship with their father, Andrew.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo se apresuran a encontrar a Tony y Ziva, que quedan atrapados en un contenedor en un astillero tras buscar refugio de un tiroteo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo tienen que intervenir un fin de semana cuando un teniente comandante de la Marina encargado de un cargamento de armas nucleares es aparentemente secuestrado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hacia lo inimaginable
programme.desc: El asesino en serie Thomas Wilder desafía a Danny con un mensaje en su última víctima, convirtiendo el juego del gato y el ratón en una venganza personal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La milla extra
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony emprenden una búsqueda para encontrar a un testigo clave que huyó por miedo a represalias y convencerlo de testificar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Boomerang
programme.desc: Estalla la indignación pública cuando no se procesa a un policía que disparó a un adolescente, afectando a Frank, el alcalde y la oficina de Erin. Danny busca al autor de un posterior tiroteo contra un oficial, posible caso de venganza.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sigue la pista a un recluso fugitivo que cose la boca a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo sospecha que un par de asesinos trabajan juntos, después de destapar dos cuerpos aparentemente no relacionados entre sí.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo se apresura a buscar una relación entre dos familias, una asesinada y la otra secuestrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo está detrás de un cirujano que hace amputaciones innecesarias.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando McGee mata a un hombre durante una misión, el equipo del NCIS interviene para respaldarle cuando descubren que el hombre era un agente de policía encubierto.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo investigan el asesinato de una supermodelo que graba un reality show en una base de los Marines.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit. An alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck — the owner says otherwise. A couple stops a woman from driving away in their car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: When the cuffs come out, an emotional cyclist gives deputies the runaround. A boyfriend’s honesty saves his girlfriend from going to jail on her birthday. Police investigate a case of road rage involving a possible gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A pair of suspects on the run pretend they were busy napping. A man reaches for something in his pocket, but denies knowing what it is. A family calls the police after their roommate brandishes a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy tries to cut a guy some slack after his relationship troubles got out of hand. A teenager gets a serious lesson in not drinking while underage. A couple is forced to take a raincheck on their wedding day.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: During a traffic stop, a driver drops off his passenger before speeding away. Deputies are amazed when a man offers them an ID that looks nothing like him. Deputies investigate a case of road rage involving a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with multiple felony warrants gets one last taste of freedom before heading to prison. A speeding driver is arrested for the same thing he was arrested for the day before. A runaway suspect leaves a trail behind him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A very cooperative car thief tells deputies all about his good fortune. An argument over business leaves one man on the ground with a bloody mouth. The occupants of a truck are oblivious to what deputies find in the backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An elderly driver sacrifices his own van during his desperate escape attempt. A traffic stop on a suspended driver turns up more than anticipated. Several car occupants learn it’s better to tell the truth from the start.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies gradually get to the bottom of a possible stolen vehicle. A woman asks the police to help her make a clean break from bad habits. A single woman tries to plan a date with an online suitor, but the night quickly goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A family gets a huge scare when a fleeing suspect finds his way into their house. Police sort out a chaotic argument between two childhood friends. A woman in a suspicious vehicle plays fast and loose with the truth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The owner of a stolen truck calls officers when he spots it in a nearby alley. A fleeing driver leads officers on a wild chase over a closed bridge. Police track down a suspect who gave a liquor store employee a phony $100 bill.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A father-to-be kicks off a dangerous vehicle pursuit over something trivial. A car that ducked out of a DUI checkpoint attracts attention. Officers respond to a disturbance caused by a local man’s erratic behavior.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies catch up to a group of teenagers enjoying a night of joyriding. A traffic stop opens the doors to recovery for a very repentant suspect. A suspect insists his car is not stolen because he did his online research.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Recovery of a stolen vehicle uncovers a weapon and a lengthy criminal history. Detectives cross paths with a car that was stolen in a carjacking. Officers speak with a man who has questionable standards regarding gun safety.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man and woman are pulled over while out on a candy run. A simple traffic violation turns into a multi-vehicle police pursuit. Deputies are notified of a stolen car and find the driver in possession of an interesting tool.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distinctive tattoo reveals a wanted felon’s true identity. Deputies talk to a young woman who traded one bad habit for another. A man in possession of a stolen vehicle tells officers how his day went from bad to worse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man receives an enormous break due to public health concerns. Officers are doubtful when two friends claim they were unaware of each other’s actions. Police pull over a car full of people who know very little about themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A car chase involves tire spikes, shredded rubber, and crashed gates. Suspects accused of burglary state they only steal to pay rent. A traffic stop proves there’s always more than meets the eye.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to outrun the law by bicycle but can’t out pedal police. A deputy goes undercover to investigate stolen baseballs. A K-9 discovers hidden contraband on a suspect’s most private places.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A seatbelt violation ends in a chase to the confusion of all involved. A suspect with a history of grand theft auto is found in another stolen car. Officers find drugs in a tough part of town.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers smell the pungent odor of marijuana during a minor traffic violation. Cocaine is found on a suspect pulled over for a broken windshield. A store is robbed by someone in a red dress.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man accused of burglary claims he’s hallucinating. A suspect tries to show off by parading his white pistol and causes pandemonium. A traffic stop offers an accused man a second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: It’s all deputies and dogs on deck in an attempt to subdue a man in distress. A suspect proves to be too sleepy to engage in truck thievery. A baby is rescued in a car with no air conditioning.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers apprehend an individual with a saw-like knife. A man accused of auto theft claims his girlfriend allowed him to borrow her wheels. Chiquita the chihuahua helps its owner through hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Stop sticks are deployed to intercept a vehicle with bullets. Two suspects watch their life unravel after being found with meth. Police assist young and restless runaways.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Sara deal with the death of what at first seems to be a transvestite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A mutilated female body is discovered tied to the undercarriage of a bus carrying prisoners from a women's correctional facility after a severed arm flies out from beneath the vehicle and strikes a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A violent murder in a casino parking garage and another episode in the police interview room lead the CSIs to one shocking discovery after another.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine, and Nick try to determine the cause of a house fire that kills a teenage girl. The fire is in the same neighborhood as a similar arson fire. Grissom and Sara investigate a man found dead with letter tiles in his stomach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine, and Nick investigate the death of a runner during a competition. Meanwhile, Sara and Warrick investigate the death of a couple in a hotel room, initially thought to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A roller coaster runs off its track, leaving six people dead. The CSI team investigates whether this was an accident or foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Heavy rains in Vegas wash up a body in the storm drains. As the team investigates, they find bones in the sewer system that could only be murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A young girl is abducted from outside a convenience store, triggering an Amber alert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a hotel suite with symptoms of the ebola virus.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a woman after a swap party where the married couples in the neighborhood meet and switch partners.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom is called to a murder of a 17-year-old in a casino penthouse. The entire team gets involved when its discovered that a kidnapping took place along with the murder.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Descubren que el niño tiene hermanos que también están en peligro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, para su competencia final, tiene que determinar cómo fue asesinado el Sherlock Holmes de un club de Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick investiga el asesinato de un hombre por alguien que aparentemente necesita una silla de ruedas. Nick investiga el asesinato de una mujer en la subcultura del narcocorrido, canciones sobre asesinatos relacionados con las drogas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick y Nick encuentran el cadáver de dos mujeres en unas obras enterradas bajo el alquitrán.El turno de swing se adentra en el mundo de las novias extranjeras por correo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofía, Sara y Greg investigan la desaparición de una mujer que volvía a casa tras una noche de fiesta con una amiga después de que su coche abandonado aparezca en el arcén de una autopista.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un importante jugador de Las Vegas aparece muerto, Ecklie ordena a ambos equipos que investiguen el caso. El hombre que tenía secretos sobre todos en Las Vegas tenía uno muy grande propio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick y Warrick investigan un cadáver gravemente mutilado en el bosque. Grissom, Sarah y Greg intentan determinar cómo fue asesinado un hombre en una habitación de hotel. Esto les lleva a una convención de mujeres grandes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie ataca de nuevo, y el equipo de CSI prueba una nueva tecnología utilizando pruebas de un asesinato anterior.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Greg investigan un incendio forestal que mató a un hombre y quemó gravemente a una mujer. Catherine, Nick y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una familia de tres miembros asesinada en su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche, cuatro casos. Grissom y Brass consiguen un Hummer robado y un puesto de tacos. Warrick atrapa a una chica muerta. Sara y Greg consiguen un culturista muerto. Nick consigue un chico muerto encontrado en un banco.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass viaja a Hollywood, California, para intentar localizar a la amiga de su hija distanciada, mientras intenta reavivar algún tipo de relación con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan el asesinato de un paciente de un hospital psiquiátrico y rápidamente reducen los sospechosos a un puñado de otros pacientes y miembros del personal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre (Alan Rosenberg) con el que Catherine flirteó en un bar reaparece en su vida como sospechoso en la investigación del asesinato de una mujer a la que dispararon y mataron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos amorosos estudiantes de primer año son encontrados muertos en un saco de dormir en un dormitorio, y Sara y Greg se topan con un callejón sin salida tras otro mientras intentan determinar por qué fueron asesinados los estudiantes.

programme.desc: A flash mob erupts on a private golf course, where the group of students there to hide a body or were they there to leave one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is pushed in front of a moving Metrorail train and both her boyfriend and his stalker ex-girlfriend are suspected of her murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami’s club scene turns deadly when underage drinking sparks a bloody murder in a bathroom stall, Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A jury field trip to the scene of a murder flips the legal tables when the defendant ends up dead and the twelve jurors become the prime suspects.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A string of dead bodies, found off the coast of Miami, turns out to be the work of modern-day pirates. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An innocent man is killed when someone falls on him from a balcony. The CSI team is lead into the center of a high-level sex and murder scandal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A "Friction Party" at a private suite in one of the city's hotels accommodating hundreds of cruise passengers leaves a young woman dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?"

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.desc: Cuando ocurre un asesinato durante una carrera de caballos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI descubren que Ryan tiene un vínculo personal con el caso.

programme.desc: Alexx Woods regresa a Miami cuando un asesino pone en peligro la vida de Calleigh y Ryan. Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI enfrentan cara a cara a un abogado defensor que puede o no estar involucrado en el encubrimiento de un asesinato.

programme.desc: Cuando unos piratas se apoderan de un yate de lujo, el futuro de Delko como CSI se ve amenazado justo cuando su relación con Calleigh pasa al siguiente nivel.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI hace un descubrimiento impactante sobre su víctima de asesinato, mientras Horatio intenta salvar a su hijo de la conducta errática de Julia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una violación de domicilio se vuelve mucho más que eso cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI descubren que son el blanco de la mafia rusa.

programme.desc: Cuando la vida de un niño inocente está en peligro, Ryan, a la larga, se ve obligado a traicionar a Horatio Caine y al resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un caso de asesinato que involucra cirugía plástica extrema conduce a Horatio Caine hasta Ron Saris, que está vivo y busca vengarse de Julia.

programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI trabajan para averiguar por qué una familia aparentemente normal fue blanco de un brutal ataque con granadas.

programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el caso de un hombre hervido vivo, Julia se descontrola y uno de los secretos más oscuros del equipo sale a la luz.

programme.desc: Horatio lucha para salvar a Yelina y cuando Delko se opone a la súplica de Calleigh y ayuda a su peligroso padre, su vida corre peligro.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a woman's death as the work of a serial killer. Mac reconnects with his first partner after an ex-con begins stalking him.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a hail of gunfire tears through the crime lab, Mac and his ex-partner become part of a vendetta 17 years in the making.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Following a near-death experience, Detective Mac Taylor becomes quite determined to close his last remaining unsolved case.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an awkward teen is found dead, the team discovers that his efforts to win a sexy punk rock chick’s heart may have gone a step too far.

programme.desc: When the body of a beautiful young woman is found in a stolen Ferrari, the investigation leads to a family of car thieves.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A night out for a friendly drink takes a very unexpected turn when Danny and his rookie cops are caught up in a shooting.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates when the recently paroled brother of a young basketball prodigy is implicated in a murder.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fraternity prank goes awry on Halloween and a pledge master is left for dead in an open grave.

programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when news of a high school house party goes viral, resulting in overcrowding, a collapsed porch, and a teenage girl’s death.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: As the CSI New York team investigates the assassination of a judge. Jo comes face to face with a criminal from her past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When an important witness turns up dead, Jo is caught up in the dangerous investigation of the suspected rapist who was freed on her watch in D.C.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Jaula (S7 Ep12)

programme.desc: Cuando un camión articulado que lleva invitados a una fiesta termina misteriosamente en el fondo del río Hudson, el equipo de CSI debe exhumar los restos empapados.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El intocable (S7 Ep16)

programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un alumno popular en la escuela privada más elitista de Manhattan, el equipo de CSI se encuentra en el competitivo mundo de los más privilegiados.

programme.desc: Jo equilibra los desafíos personales y profesionales cuando su hija adoptiva, Ellie, es la testigo clave en la investigación de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Comida con sentimiento (S7 Ep19)

programme.desc: Después de una experiencia cercana a la muerte, el detective Mac Taylor está bastante decidido a cerrar su último caso sin resolver.

programme.title: Boxing

programme.title: Boxing

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emotions are supercharged as Kelli & Judy make a lot of tough cuts to keep up the quality of the team. Melissa Rycroft offers invaluable field experience.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli finally announces the squad. Injuries threaten the opening of Cowboys training camp. Game Day chaos endangers a flawless performance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented hopefuls arrive to try out for the best cheerleading team in the world, while many of the returning girls are looking for redemption. New judges increase the pressure of moving on to Finals.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Veterans fight for their jobs as new girls try to live their dreams and make DCC Training Camp. Standing in their way is; panel Interviews, solos, an exhausting dance combination and a room full of very tough judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The new candidates' eyes are opened as they get a taste of what it is to be a DCC. As girls struggle to learn the dances, the reality of being "Big Time", sets in. Melissa Rycroft meets the new girls for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the first cut looming, the girls must push their dance skills to the limit. Melissa Rycroft works to bring out showmanship. Extra stress is added on Makeover day as the girls try to get the DCC look.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: A new choreographer shakes things up. The girls better start looking good because uniform fittings and the Belk fashion show are on the agenda. Surprises continue when two-time Grammy winner Kacey Musgraves, stops by rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft makes a house call to help Yuko. Kitty Carter rocks a few of the candidate's worlds. Cameos give Kelli & Judy a fresh perspective on the girls. At Show Group auditions, the girls let it all hang out.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kellie Pickler comes to a rehearsal to share her experience and motivate the girls as Training Camp is coming to an end. Melissa Rycroft makes Kelsey aware of a big mistake. Candace Romo helps with a big night of cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Squad announcement is bittersweet as some favorites go home. The team has their first appearance at the Star Ribbon cutting. Game Day is when dreams come true!

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of beautiful and talented women converge on AT&T Stadium to start the hardest audition process in professional sports, trying out for a coveted spot on the most famous NFL cheerleading squad in the world, the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With the field narrowed down to 119 women, the pressure is on. They must quickly learn a power pom routine and the famous kickline in order to perform it an hour later before the judges.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The veterans finally enter the audition process. Now all 83 women are judged head to head during a panel interview, a solo dance performance and on their appearance on the football field as seen and the big screen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: 44 women begin the very first training camp at the new 1 billion dollar Cowboys' facility, The Star. At the First Meeting, Kelli lays down the law and makes it clear that eight women will be sent home this summer.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: First, the ladies need to have the "classic look" of a Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader. Kelli's hair and make-up transformations are legendary. The ladies are also assessed through a new state of the art fitness test, "Styku".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli media trains the rookie candidates to determine who best represents the DCC at press events. NBC news anchor, Meredith Land tests their on-camera interview skills.

programme.desc: A lot of crazy stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the original Flavorettes are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.desc: After snitching, fighting, and spitting, and nearly getting eliminated, one man is the house enemy and anxiously waits for an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool"

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Perfect Ashley is beginning to bore even herself. With their parents away for the weekend, Ashley decides to join Toby in breaking the "one-guest-each" rule and invites Paige and Hazel to join her and Terri.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Although his father is gone, Craig wants to get on with his life as normal. He insists on going back to school immediately and becomes frustrated with his friends when they behave with concern.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart examines how the rocks beneath our feet played a crucial role in determining the beliefs of ancient civilisations.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how ancient civilisations learned to exploit the water around them, from the flooding of our Stone Age ancestors' hunting grounds to the fall of the Roman Empire.

programme.title: Journeys From the Centre of the Earth
programme.desc: Dr Iain Stewart looks at how salt has played a crucial role in the history of the Mediterranean, from the ice ages to the preservation of food and dead bodies in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: It was one of the greatest vanishing acts in history. More than 3,000 years ago a mysterious and ruthless civilisation rose from nothing, created a brutal and unstoppable army and built an empire that rivalled Egypt and Babylon.

programme.title: Wildlife on One
programme.desc: Fossil remains serve as clues in discovering how prehistoric flying creatures lived.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: Anatomist Professor Alice Roberts and biologist Dr George McGavin go on an extraordinary evolutionary journey to meet our ancient ancestors. They start with our closest prehistoric relative, a Neanderthal.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team go back 1.5 million years to meet one of the earliest humans, Homo erectus. They walked the earth far longer than any other human species and were the first ancestors to look a lot like we do today.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team looks at probably the most famous of all our early ancestors. She is called Lucy from the species Australopithecus afarensis and she lived 3.2 million years ago. Lucy's species had traded life in the trees for life on the ground.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: The Lost World
programme.desc: Professor Challenger leads a party of explorers from the smog of Edwardian London to South America in search of a mythical plateau rumoured to be inhabited by dinosaurs.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.desc: The Doctor informs the Kaled government of Davros's experiments and they move to shut down the bunker.

programme.desc: When the Kaled dome is destroyed, the war appears to be over and the Thals rejoice at their victory.

programme.desc: The Kaled elite move to prevent the development of the Daleks while the Doctor hopes to destroy them forever.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in search of a potentially dangerous fugitive, he's only 19 and charged with kidnapping and menacing. The case takes an unexpected turn when the Chapman clan ends up in a confrontation with the suspect's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team are back in Colorado hunting bounties. Today's fugitive has a long rap sheet and a reputation for packing heat. With nothing but an address and phone number, the team heads out on the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Kimo does a vanishing act for his day in court, and now Dog and the posse have to find him. With precious few leads to follow, Dog turns to the fugitive's on again-off-again girlfriend, but she's initially reluctant to join the hunt.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog and the family are back in Colorado and are about to make one of their most exciting captures ever. When the adrenaline-fueled arrest goes down, every family member will play a critical role.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan start their hunt today with another well-established bail bonding family. And in fact, as Dog's fame has grown, so have his responsibilities. So in addition to tracking down two felons on the lam, Dog has to prepare for a good.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is confronted with two alleged felons who are in crisis. Family and friends of these bondees are convinced that they are getting into further trouble while awaiting trial, so Dog and the posse have to bring these men back to jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Christopher is barely 21, who already has a history of domestic abuse and assault, and now he's facing major time in a room without a view. This hunt won't be easy for Dog -- the leads are few, informers and family are not forthcoming.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her, bondsman Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is busy. First, he's after a fugitive who is allegedly an expert in the game of "burn and return"--shoplifting goods to return them for cash refunds.? But he's not easy to track.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Going after two fugitives in one day is tough enough without the facing Colorado's notoriously unpredictable weather. Today it's the threat of severe thunderstorm, hail and area wide tornado warnings.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It hurts Dog to see people who?after years of walking the straight and narrow, suddenly lose their way. But today's case is a member of the law enforcement community who has recently gone astray, and that truly troubles the Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Denver and in hot pursuit of a woman wanted for identity theft. The sad reality is that the identity which has been robbed is her own. She's traded in a bright future for a life on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Being hunted by the Dog is a lousy way to celebrate your birthday, but that's exactly the spot that Robert finds himself in today. He's missed his court date, quit his job, and vacated his last known address.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors, but instead of hunting for treats, they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: The Protector
programme.desc: Two New York cops, Billy Wong and Danny Garoni, head to Hong Kong after the daughter of a rich businessman is kidnapped by the drug lord, Mr. Ko.

programme.title: Operation Condor
programme.desc: Jackie Chan ignites the big screen as the world's greatest secret agent, code name Condor. Sent to track down stolen Nazi gold, he is pursued by a ruthless band of treasure-hunting terrorists on a globe-spanning quest to reach the bounty first!

programme.title: Operation Condor II: The Armour Of The Gods
programme.desc: Jackie Chan is a fortune hunter whose ex-girlfriend is kidnapped by an evil cult! Things kick into high gear when her fiancée, an old friend of Jackie’s, asks him for help in securing the kidnappers’ lone demand: the priceless Armor of The Gods!

programme.title: The Prisoner
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a shrewd cop who goes undercover with a team of mercenaries when a man he put away two years before commits a murder. The film features the great Sammo Hung as well as the terrific Tony Leung Ka Fai.

programme.title: City Hunter
programme.desc: Extremely silly comedy about a self-indulgent private investigator who winds up on a cruise ship full of rich patrons, gorgeous women, murderous terrorists, and scarce food.

programme.title: The Accidental Spy (Te Wu Mi Cheng)
programme.desc: After foiling an attempted bank robbery, an ordinary salesman (Jackie Chan) becomes an instant hero. His sudden fame also reveals he's the latest in a long line of professional spies, and about to become entangled in a mystery only he can unravel.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 6-year-old Michelle Lee Dorr went missing, her father confessed to murdering her. But investigators soon poked holes in his story, leaving the case unsolved for 14 years.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1996 investigation into 48-year-old Martha Hansen's murder is helped by a legal requirement that bars have video cameras installed on the premises.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murders of an elderly couple leave police stumped until, two years later, they receive a major break. A jeweler looking through old newspaper clippings recognizes a necklace the female victim wore as having been pawned in her own shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of 9-year-old Jessica Knott, police use a garbage bag to connect suspect James Edward Crow, Jr. to the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of Katie Poirier is stymied by the lack of a body. Finally, investigators use a single tooth found among some charred remains to identify her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The only clue recovered from a shooting is a twelve-guage shotgun. Scientists use unique methods to lift the serial number from the weapon to trace it to its owner

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A three-year-old develops a respiratory condition. His father has Alzheimers. An investigator reveals that their ill health is due to mold in their modern home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman convicted of killing her mother in a car fire is granted a new trial. An expert witness has a different opinion as to how the fire started and, if proven, would clear the woman of any culpability.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Authorities track a kidnapper who let his victim write a last will and informed the family of her murder. A phone number written on a previous page left a lasting impression, which helped to convict.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man dies in his home after a long history of heart disease. A few weeks after the funeral, rumors surface that the death was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, a 12-year-old was found murdered in her Minnesota home. Despite a meticulous search of the home and an exhaustive investigation, police had no suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A mother of two vanishes after a shopping trip. Her body is discovered a month later, and witnesses say they saw the victim being forced into a car by an unknown person.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is shot to death in her store just one day before she is to testify against the man accused of robbing her. The robber becomes the prime suspect, but he has a solid alibi: a timestamped videotape of his activities on the day of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the state of Florida was known for more than just Disney World. Worldwide attention focused on a rash of robberies which targeted tourists. Some vacationers were killed in these attacks, but some fought and survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe print, several foreign hairs and unknown fingerprints at a murder scene. But they believe the most telling piece of evidence is the bite mark on the victim's chest.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman's death in Pennsylvania triggers a homicide investigation into another woman's death in North Carolina. Faced with striking similarities, examiners must determine if their suspect's story about accidental drowning is all wet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 34-year-old nurse experiences a variety of flu-like symptoms. None of her doctors are able to discover the cause, until she visits her gynecologist for a routine check-up.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Time of death becomes pivotal after a pregnant woman is found murdered in her air-conditioned bedroom. A striking similarity between her death and an HBO movie gives examiners the clues they need to thaw out the alibi of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Police were puzzled by an obscure print found at a crime scene where one man had been killed and two teenage girls were seriously injured. Neither of the girls could identify their attacker, but one simple clue helped track the footsteps of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home and his ex-wife has a perfect alibi. To determine time of death, investigators need to know when the victim ate his last meal. An endocrinologist, a forensic botanist and a short-order cook answer their question.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A traveling showman (Red Buttons) hawks a supposedly medicinal powder from India.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Doc Baker drafts Charles to help townspeople quarantined during a typhus outbreak.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Caroline volunteers Charles to keep a round-the-clock watch on a drunken, abusive father.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A school-trained farmer (Alan Fudge) convinces Charles to switch from wheat to a new corn variety.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Ingalls family, returning from a trip to the city, is stopped by a U.S. marshal looking for a Sioux renegade.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A farm boy (Mitch Vogel) takes Mr. Edward's tales to heart and heads to the big city.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Founder's Day festivities promise fun and friendly competition for all except aging logger Jim Tyler, who fears losing the log chopping contest to a younger Charles Ingalls.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When a company that owes money to Charles becomes bankrupt, Charlies ends up deep in debt and puts a lot of financial strain on the family.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary's failing eyes end up causing issues with her schoolwork; when Charles gets her glasses, her class begins to tease her for them.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura Ingalls is stunned to learn that her fishing friend is Walnut Grove's new banker; she gets upset when he accuses her of befriending him to secure a loan.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The town gathers for a baseball match between the Green-Stockings of Sleepy Eye and the men of Walnut Grove.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura decides to find out for herself if a hermit (John Anderson) is really a maniac.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Widow Snider (Bonnie Bartlett) scheme to get dates for the spring dance.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A dying widow (Patricia Neal) asks the Ingalls to help find homes for her children.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A boy who lives on Mont Saint Michel in France wants to build the biggest and best sandcastle ever.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Bogota asks the Super Wings for a spray-painting drone to help her take part in a mural contest.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a sticker book to a boy named Victor in Mexico whose Mom has a plan: if Victor earns 10 stickers by doing 10 chores, she'll give him a big reward.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Sylvia asks for a special watering can for her flowers, Jett and Dizzy head to Bulgaria.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl in Moscow with a rock collection orders a special box with compartments labeled for the coolest rocks ever.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A girl on Easter Island asks the Super Wings to make her giant propeller caps for the Moai statues near her home.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett delivers a giant Snakes and Ladders game to Anita who is having a pajama party with her friends. To complete a game challenge, Donnie's Build-It Buddies turn Anita's bed into a princess carriage.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: When a girl named Louisa in Germany goes to visit her favorite amusement park, she's sad to learn that it is being closed forever; the Super Wings work to give the park a makeover and a whole new lease on life.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett and Donnie head for Roros, Norway to deliver a dress that shoots pretend snow. It's for a girl named Alice who wants the dress for a play she is starring in called "The Snow Princess".

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Grand Albert's Telephoto Transformer is mistakenly delivered to a boy named Marcel who lives in Paris.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Sunny Patch has been hit with a heatwave. Felix and his family might have to find a deeper pond. / Lil Sis and Princess Honey Bee get tired of being treated like babies and want to play with the big kids.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Wiggle discovers that everyone has their own special style when it comes to art. Then, Dragon tricks Spinner into thinking he's a better basketberry player than he really is.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Dragon pretends to have the bug flu to get out of going to a tea party. Holley and Miss Spider teach the kids to tell time.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Squirt dreams he loses his voice and has to go to the Echo Fairy to get it back. / Spiderus' lair is covered in mold, and has to depend on the kindness of his neighbours.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Shimmer tries to prevent Spiderus from picking the most beautiful flower in Sunny Patch. Then, Squirt and Bounce have to put their dreams of finding golden treasure on hold to help a bug in need.

programme.title: Miss Spider's Sunny Patch Friends
programme.desc: Squirt, Shimmer, and Spinner come across Felix a tongue-tied frog. They help Felix get free and become instant playmates.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: When Nick's favourite flyer gets stuck in the tree, Nick wishes he could jump really high and retrieve it, but gravity holds him down.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are disappointed when their toy's battery runs out of power. The Cat takes them to Lots-o-Lakes Land to see the flight of the Dipsydoodlers.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are playing musical instruments and notice that Fish's water is rippling. Why? Cat takes them to the Jingly Jungle for a concert by the great Vibrato.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally are frustrated by a puddle that always forms at an inconvenient spot on the sidewalk. They go to a water park and learn that water always seeks the lowest level.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Sally loses her slideyness and when they go to the Frictionarium, they find out that there's a force called friction that can stop a person from sliding.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally wonder if they can walk on a cloud, and the Cat takes them to Mount Knowmore. As they climb up, they discover hard surfaces and watery surfaces and walk through fog.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick unintentionally loses Sally's bouncy ball. They go to Ballaballo and learn how different balls are made of different materials that make them bouncier.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally don't understand why one toy car goes faster than another.

programme.title: Maggie and the Ferocious Beast

programme.title: US Festival 1983: Days 1-3
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: The ultimate concert took place on Memorial Day Weekend 1983. Features performances from U2, the Clash, Judas Priest, Stevie Nicks, Scorpions, INXS, Men at Work, Stray Cats, Triumph, Missing Persons and more

programme.title: What is Classic Rock?
programme.desc: How do you define classic rock? Is it a genre, a radio format, or music from a specific period of time? Filmmaker & lifelong rocker Daniel Sarkissian travels the world, interviewing iconic artists in search of an answer.

programme.title: The Who: Tommy Live at the Royal Albert Hall
programme.desc: After spending six months on the round, The Who crowned their 2000 North American and UK tour with a special evening at the Royal Albert Hall in London.

programme.title: Queen: How They Broke Free
programme.desc: Few bands have ever come close to achieving the same stature of greatness as Queen. Their ability to dominate and amaze audiences was relentless.

programme.title: Prince: Purple Reign
programme.desc: In recent times, music lovers have been confounded with the tragic and shocking news that some of their most beloved stars had passed away in controversial circumstances.

programme.title: Peter Gabriel: Secret World - Live
programme.desc: Featuring singer Peter Gabriel live in concert in Modena in Italy.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Olivia Newton-John amassed three Grammys and eight American Music Awards.

programme.title: Mighty Good: The Beatles
programme.desc: No musical group has had as profound an impact on pop music as The Beatles. Tony Palmer’s groundbreaking documentary gives us an intimate look at one of the most influential groups in musical history.

programme.title: Living on Soul
programme.desc: Filmed during their three-night, sold-out residency at the historic Apollo Theater, this hybrid docu-concert film features the late great Sharon Jones, Charles Bradley and the rest of the Grammy-nominated Daptone Records family.

programme.title: My Best Friend's An Animal
programme.desc: Exploring the softer side of Tasmanian devils; meeting a pioneering sea turtle and enjoying family dinner with Buttons, the deer; playing football with a bull.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Australia is home to an eclectic array of creatures, and the ways to succeed as an alpha are just as diverse; the beach turns into a dueling ground and the outback becomes a boxing ring, as animals face off with their own kind.

programme.title: World's Deadliest
programme.desc: Living in paradise is no holiday for many animals as it is hunting grounds for some terrifying and deadly creatures.

programme.title: World's Deadliest
programme.desc: Baby predators learn to hunt and some emerge from the womb ready to kill.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: The African savanna is an epic landscape, and whether it's head-bashing hippos, hormone-crazed elephants or dueling lions, battles that rage on the savanna are just as epic.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Welcome to India - a land of exotic animals and exotic warfare; monkeys stage dusty dust-ups, blackbucks wage open war on the open plains, and peacock dandies swing switchblades: these are colorful battles worthy of a vibrant land.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Steering clear of alphas, whose horns, claws and other protective gear keep them ready for battle, no matter what the weather dishes out; examining killer Highland cow horns, plucky mallard bills, razor-edged wolverine claws, and more.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: A male brown hare throws punches at his beloved; admiring a sandhill crane dance battle; ibexes butt heads (literally) during mating season; why leopards are stealth masters.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Massive elephant seals go nose to nose to win the title of beach master; giant petrels earn the nickname "murderous garbagemen"; a female humpback goes to extremes to protect her calf from amorous males.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Canada, where summer is short and time is tight, any time is the right time to fight; the mighty North provides the setting for bison, bald eagles and polar bears to wage some of the most heavy-duty fighting in the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Wild Wild Bunch
programme.desc: Analyzing the shady methods that animal delinquents use to create fear and chaos.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Learning to fight dirty with a guanaco, head-butting a fellow iguana to claim a piece of prime territory, and meeting a hermit crab who forcibly evicts a tenant from its shell.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: With real-life dueling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill - on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

programme.title: Serial Psyche
programme.desc: Some serial killers are driven by a hatred for humankind, while others seek revenge for their abusive childhoods; some simply love to kill; a look at a killer labeled America's most meticulous serial killer, Israel Keyes.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Bighorn rams rattle the mountaintops; Brown bears battle, desperate to fatten up for winter; Sharp-tailed grouse shake their tail-feathers; Wild stallions rumble with beauty and grace.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: From the Highlands to the Alps, Europe's evocative landscapes are the backdrop for epic wildlife drama; normally stoic red deer go wild during the rut; wolf packs clash over territory, and foxes do the foxtrot but it's not as nice as it sounds.

programme.title: Alpha
programme.desc: Find out what it takes to be the leader of a wolf, deer, rhino, or lion pack.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Meeting alphas who get by with a little help from their friends; the inescapable gang mentality of mating male dolphins; ant colonies' unique scents; female geladas always get the last word; wolves hunt family-style.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Celebrating small but mighty animal warriors armed with sheaves of scary weapons; admiring nutrias' stink bombs; honey badgers' needlelike choppers; black-tailed gulls' razor-sharp beaks; the killer talons on dive-bombing peregrine falcons.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Declarations of theft show up throughout the city, and they all bear the message "Tonight I'm going to get you, Lupin III," with a lipstick mark underneath. The one who's been distributing the notes is Rebecca.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Da Vinci announces that he is going to unveil his latest work in San Marino. Its title is "World Harmony." After the announcement, for some reason, people all around the Italian Peninsula fall unconscious... and Lupin and the gang are no exception.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca's personality is under Da Vinci's control. In an effort to save her, Lupin delves into her mind, where he struggles with all kinds of traps set by Da Vinci. He manages to find Rebecca's memories, but Da Vinci has overwritten all her memories.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin meets Rebecca to sign divorce papers, before they could finish they are attacked by zombies.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca remembers the first time she meets Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #13: Alcatraz Connection
programme.desc: Master thief Lupin III, gunslinger Jigen and swordmaster Goemon are back for a new caper, this time aboard the casino-ship Machine Gun Kelly. Between the mafia, interpol, and a secret organization based under Alcatraz!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Maddie and her mom Crystal were best friends until Maddie met her boyfriend, Korey. Crystal sees Korey as a bad influence on her daughter. Now that she's pregnant, the drama is even more intense.

programme.title: 16 and Pregnant
programme.desc: Camryn was 14 when she met her boyfriend, Cam. His personality has often put him at odds with Camryn's mom. After finding out Camryn was pregnant and losing his job, he was forced to move into Sarah's house and try to put their issues to the side.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers delights in a visitor who can whistle, especially because that's something Mister Rogers hasn't been able to learn. Nobody can do everything!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks and sings about wondering and being curious, which is important for learning! Jazz saxophonist Eric Kloss, who is blind, shows how he uses a special machine called the Kurzweil Personal Reader!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Elevators and escalators - Mister Rogers shows some toy machines, and rides on real ones that lift people and cars. There's even a hydraulic platform delivered by Mr. McFeely in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A domino display artist sets up thousands of dominoes. When one is knocked over, they all go down in a fascinating pattern. Lady Elaine's elevator in Make-Believe takes Robert Troll up in the air as if he's flying.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Flags, marbles, a slide – so many things go up and down. Mister Rogers learns some up and down exercises from Neighbor Marilyn Barnett and Kara, a young ballerina.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: A visit with world famous clarinetist, Richard Stoltzman, who makes music playing notes that go up and down. In Make-Believe, there's hope that an elevator operator will solve the up and down problem at Lady Elaine's Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Balloon artist, Bruce Franco, blows up balloons into animal shapes. It takes a lot of practice to be able to make fancy things like that from balloons. Then, Mr. McFeely and Mayor Maggie go up in the air for a hot-air balloon ride.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of how people make stuffed bears. Mr. McFeely encounters someone dressed in a bear costume. Daniel recognizes that the bear is a person in costume and realizes that person is Lady Aberlin.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting the Neighborhood aviary, Mister Rogers sees a variety of birds. King Friday scolds his birds as they fail to meet his exercise expectations. Mayor Maggie invites the birds to join her as she goes to the new "Museum of Love."

programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers takes out a wooden block and talks about when he was young and would use a block to pretend he was shaving. At Negri's Music Shop, mandolinist Peter Ostroushko sings a Ukrainian lullaby.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers blows some bubbles and calls a plumber because the water in his house isn't working.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Jim West, a shadow artist, creates silhouettes of various animals. King Friday asks Robert Troll to help him by return some shadows that were left behind at the castle by various Neighbors.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces Mr. Morrison, who is playing the organ. Neighbor Aber says that anytime someone says anything about three-cornered hats, Lady Elaine squirts them with her hose.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a pair of crutches and a cast. He shows how to walk with crutches. King Friday continues to insist that everyone wear a "three-cornered one." Betty Okonak Templeton finds a loophole in King Friday's command.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: At the Colonial Williamsburg Millinery Shop, Mister Rogers wears 18th century clothing. Mayor Maggie informs King Friday that those in Westwood are planning to take off their three-cornered hats.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
